title: FangSu Blocks 方速·方块包
description: A MTR Extension Based on ANTE. Provides JS based screendoors, ticketmachines and so on
body:
# FangSu Blocks 方速·方块包

如果您喜欢我的项目, 很希望您能够对我小小赞助一些, 这会对我很有帮助! 同时您也可以获取更好的支持.

FangSu blocks are now published in mod! download here: </br>
方速包出模组版了！您可以在这里下载：</br>
[https://modrinth.com/mod/fangsu-mtr-addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/fangsu-mtr-addon)

<details>
<summary>IMPORTANT 重要!</summary>

Dependences 依赖项

This pack depends on MTR(3.2.2) and ANTE. Download here:</br>
依赖于MTR(3.2.2)和ANTE，在这里下载:</br>

https://modrinth.com/project/ybOYitTg</br>
https://modrinth.com/project/XKPAmI6u</br>

</details>

## English description

<details>
<summary>English description</summary>

MTR Extension Based on ANTE

Provide JavaScript-based screendoors, PIDS, sign, and ticket machines

Provide a new configuration UI, through which you can select the model to use

Provide a set of available extension interfaces, allowing you to create content based on this resource pack

Some of the codes are open source by CC BY-SA [https://github.com/596wjr/FangSu-Blocks](https://github.com/596wjr/FangSu-Blocks)

</details>

## 简中简介
<details>
<summary>Chinese (Simplified) description</summary>

基于ANTE的MTR扩展.

包含基于JavaScript的屏蔽门(安全门 站台闸门/幕门), 乘客信息显示屏(PIDS), 指示牌, 检票闸机等物件.

包含全新的配置UI, 美观的同时好用

包含扩展接口, 你可以开发属于你自己的扩展([开发文档](https://doc.fangsu.top/))

部分代码在此开源[https://github.com/596wjr/FangSu-Blocks](https://github.com/596wjr/FangSu-Blocks)

</details>

## Excellent Expansions 优秀的扩展包

<details>
<summary>Excellent Expansions 优秀的扩展包</summary>

[MTR Beijing Subway Addon 北京地铁扩展](https://modrinth.com/project/SQbV8Djz)

[MTR Decoration Expansion 地铁装饰扩展](https://modrinth.com/project/zWTQjXZl)

MTR CR Addon 中国铁路扩展</br>
_在内部群聊中发布_

</details>


<details>
<summary>Packs in same serious 同系列资源包</summary>

[FangSu Urban Construction Pack 方速·城建包](https://afdian.com/item/8fc2114aa05b11f09d365254001e7c00)

</details>

## Development Annoucement 开发公告

正在开发高版本模组版, 对资源包的维护会放缓一些
